stemHtml: What are the privileges of an ATPL(A) licence holder?

options.a: Privileges of LAPL, PPL, CPL, ATPL; may act as PIC on commercial flights.
options.b: Privileges of LAPL, CPL, ATPL; PIC on single-engine commercial flights.
options.c: Privileges of LAPL, CPL, ATPL; PIC on multi-engine commercial flights only.
options.d: Privileges of LAPL, PPL, CPL, ATPL, MPL; PIC on single-engine commercial flights.
